createOrReplace.name: Scarlett
createOrReplace.excerpt: 37th-floor French restaurant atop Pullman Bangkok Hotel G on Silom Road. Chef Sylvain Royer, Maitre Cuisinier de France. Over 150 wine labels. Dry-aged steaks. Rooftop terrace.
createOrReplace.overview: Scarlett occupies the full rooftop of Pullman Bangkok Hotel G, 37 floors above Bang Rak. The kitchen is led by Sylvain Royer, a Maitre Cuisinier de France, who runs a produce-driven French bistro menu with emphasis on grilled meats, seafood, and imported charcuterie. The wine program carries over 150 labels. A resident DJ plays lounge sets nightly. The terrace wraps the building with views of the Silom-Sathorn skyline.
createOrReplace.insiderTip: Arrive at opening on a weekday to secure a terrace table without a reservation. Happy hour runs daily until 19:00. Order from the charcuterie and cheese selection rather than the mains for the kitchen strongest suit alongside the wine list.
createOrReplace.address: 37F, Pullman Bangkok Hotel G, 188 Silom Road, Suriyawong, Bang Rak, Bangkok 10500
